# Packaging Factory Direct

B2B custom packaging manufacturer. MOQ 500 PCS. RFQ only.

Homepage data is locked to homepage/featured tags in data/homepage.locked.json and never reads Latest.
ISR: core pages prebuilt; product/blog/news details generated per path. Revalidate one specified URL through /api/revalidate.
Search: header search redirects to /products.html?q=keyword and filters product cards.

Product feed: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/product-feed.json
Sitemap: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/sitemap.xml
